mnemonic:

examples.eng: Murmansk is a port in the North.
Milk is delivered twice a day.
examples.ru: Молоко приносят два раза в день (каждый день).

examples.eng: She got an A on the exam.
examples.ru: Она получила высший балл на экзамене.

examples.eng: If I'd known there was a luncheon party on I woulda stayed home.
